Package org.eventb.internal.core.basis

Class PRUtil

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.basis.PRUtil
public class PRUtil extends Object
Utility methods shared by PRStoredPred and PRStoredExpr.

1.0

      public PRUtil()

  • Method Details

    • buildTypenv

      public static ISealedTypeEnvironment buildTypenv(IInternalElement ie, ISealedTypeEnvironment baseTypenv) throws org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Returns the type environment to use for reading a stored formula (predicate or expression).
      Parameters:
      ie - internal element containing the stored formula
      baseTypenv - common type environment for all stored formulas
      Returns:
      the type environment to use for parsing the formula stored in the given Rodin element
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - in case of problem accessing the Rodin database, or if a component of the resulting type environment is invalid
      org.eclipse.core.runtime.CoreException
      Since:
      3.0

    • setPRIdentifiers

      public static void setPRIdentifiers(IInternalElement ie, Formula<?> formula, ISealedTypeEnvironment baseTypenv, org.eclipse.core.runtime.IProgressMonitor monitor) throws RodinDBException
      Stores the local free identifier declarations for the given formula to be stored in the given Rodin element. This method will remove all children IPRIdentifiers and create as many IPRIdentifier children as free identifiers occurring in the given formula that do not belong to the given base type environment.
      Parameters:
      ie - internal element where the given formula will be stored
      formula - the formula to be stored
      baseTypenv - common type environment for all stored formulas
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - in case of problem accessing the Rodin database
